name: Copilot Landing
description: Marketing landing page showcasing an AI copilot product. Features a split hero with live demo, feature breakdown, how-it-works flow, and conversion CTAs.

page_briefs.home: Copilot product landing page with a split hero section — left side shows a headline, subtext, and primary CTA button; right side embeds an interactive copilot demo where visitors can type a question and see a simulated AI response in real time. Below, a features grid highlights core capabilities: context-aware suggestions, keyboard-first interaction, multi-model support, and workspace integration, each with icons and descriptions. A how-it-works section walks through three steps — connect your workspace, configure the copilot, and start collaborating — with numbered illustrations. The page closes with a full-width CTA section encouraging sign-up with primary and secondary buttons and social proof metrics.

shells.top-nav-footer: Top navigation bar with footer for public-facing marketing pages
